programs.title: Mere Jeevan Saathi
programs.desc: An Indian pop star is coming to USA in order to sign a contract with one of the leading music studios. He finds himself heaving one night affair with the CEO of the company. Things go wrong when he find her in his flight back home.

programs.title: Parwana
programs.desc: Parwana, a thief, steals a bag containing explosives, which belongs to a dangerous man. The police then set out to hunt him as he is now labelled a terrorist.

programs.title: Pyaar Zindagi Hai
programs.desc: Pratap's growing obsession with Priya, his sister-in-law, drives him to kill his wife. However, when he realises that Priya is betrothed to Amit, Pratap goes to great lengths to attain her.

programs.title: Sultaan
programs.desc: Don Kabira helps Ayesha in saving her garage from local goons and hides the fact that he once used to be an honest inspector. However, Ayesha decides to find out the reason for his transformation.

programs.title: C Kkompany
programs.desc: Three friend residents in the 'C' block of a Mumbai Apartment complex with monetary issues decide to create a fake organization 'C Company' in order to extort 1 Crore Rupees but thimgs goes wrong.

programs.title: Mission Istaanbul
programs.desc: A news reporter must uncover the secret on the 13th floor of a News Station.
